title: Okta for Good Nonprofit Technology Initiative
description: Okta for Good Nonprofit Technology Initiative provides eligible nonprofit or social-impact organizations with software donations, nonprofit discounts, cloud credits, productivity tools, security tools under its current published program terms.
eligibility: Organizations must satisfy the provider's current nonprofit-status verification, acceptable-use, product, and regional requirements.
value: Donated and discounted identity technology and implementation support for qualifying nonprofits.
